post_purchase_order_description: This makes the purchase order available for conversion into a purchase. Posted orders cannot be edited.
cancel_purchase_order_description: This cancels the purchase order and prevents it from being converted into a purchase.
no_purchase_order_selected: Select a posted purchase order to load its items
eligible_purchase_orders_title: Posted Purchase Orders for this Supplier
eligible_purchase_orders_description: Pick a purchase order to autofill this purchase, or close this dialog to continue manually.
no_eligible_purchase_orders: No posted purchase orders for this supplier
